# Baseline

> Speech you can measure. Baseline runs the same public statement through parallel AI systems and shows side-by-side observational analysis with source context. Observational analysis only, not a fact-check. Currently pre-launch with an open waitlist.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.baseline.marketing/): what Baseline is and the waitlist
- [Features](https://www.baseline.marketing/features): what the product shows
- [Methodology](https://www.baseline.marketing/methodology): how statements are ingested and analyzed
- [Ethos](https://www.baseline.marketing/ethos): principles and limits
- [Pricing](https://www.baseline.marketing/pricing): plans at launch

## Facts
- Same input run across parallel systems, results shown side by side
- Outputs may vary between systems; sources and context remain the reference surface
- Status: pre-launch, waitlist open

Built by Winters Code (https://winterscode.com), Bandon, Oregon.
